Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by UtilityKing, such as energy tariff switching or broadband plan matching.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Energy Tariff Switch').

description.description: A detailed description of the service.

ValueProposition.title: ValueProposition
ValueProposition.description: Represents a value proposition offered by UtilityKing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the value proposition.

title.description: The title of the value proposition (e.g., '100% impartial').

description.description: A detailed description of the value proposition.

icon.description: Icon associated with the value proposition.

AIComparison.title: AIComparison
AIComparison.description: Represents an AI-powered comparison of utility plans based on user input.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AI comparison.

userInput.description: The user's input used for the comparison.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the comparison was generated.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the UtilityKing platform.

AnimatedCTABanner.title: AnimatedCTABanner
AnimatedCTABanner.description: Represents a call to action banner with animations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CTA banner.

promptText.description: The text prompt displayed on the banner.

buttonText.description: The text displayed on the call-to-action button.

ContactSubmission.title: ContactSubmission
ContactSubmission.description: Represents a submission from the contact form.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the form.

email.description: The email address of the person.

isBusiness.description: Whether the inquiry is for a business.

businessName.description: The name of the business, if applicable.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the form was submitted.

ComparisonLead.title: ComparisonLead
ComparisonLead.description: Represents a lead captured from the comparison tool.

name.description: The name of the potential customer.

email.description: The email address of the potential customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the potential customer.

comparisonInputs.description: The inputs provided by the user in the comparison wizard.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the lead was captured.

definition.description: Stores information about the services offered.  No user-specific authorization required.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: The unique ID of the service.

definition.description: Stores the value propositions offered by UtilityKing. No user-specific authorization required.

params.name: valuePropositionId
params.description: The unique ID of the value proposition.

definition.description: Stores AI comparison data specific to a user. Authorization is based on path ownership.

params.name: aiComparisonId
params.description: The ID of the AI comparison.

definition.description: Stores user profile data.  Authorization based on path ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

definition.description: Stores data for animated call-to-action banners. No user-specific authorization required.

params.name: animatedCTABannerId
params.description: The unique ID of the CTA banner.

definition.description: Stores submissions from the contact form. Publicly writable.

params.name: submissionId
params.description: The unique ID of the contact submission.

definition.description: Stores leads captured from the comparison tool. Publicly writable.

params.name: leadId
params.description: The unique ID of the comparison lead.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the features of UtilityKing, focusing on authorization independence, clear access patterns, and efficient data retrieval. 

*   **/services collection:** Stores static service data (e.g., Energy Tariff Switch).  No user-specific authorization is required, simplifying rules.  QAPs are supported since there is no need for filtering based on user data.
*   **/value_propositions collection:** Stores static value proposition data (e.g., 100% impartial). No user-specific authorization is required, simplifying rules. QAPs are supported since there is no need for filtering based on user data.
*   **/animated_cta_banners collection:** Stores static animated CTA banner data. No user-specific authorization is required, simplifying rules.  QAPs are supported since there is no need for filtering based on user data.
*   **/users/{userId}/ai_comparisons collection:** Stores user-specific AI comparison results. This structure follows the Path-Based Ownership access modeling, ensuring that only the user can access their comparisons. Authorization Independence is naturally achieved because access control is based solely on the path.  This directly supports QAPs as listing ai_comparisons is limited to a specific user.
*   **/contact_submissions collection:** Stores contact form submissions. It is publicly writable so any user can send a message, but read/update/delete access is restricted for security.
*   **/comparison_leads collection:** Stores leads from the comparison tool. It is publicly writable so any user can submit their details, but read/update/delete access is restricted for security.

This structure prioritizes security and scalability by:

*   **Authorization Independence:** Avoiding `get()` calls in security rules. The `ai_comparisons` subcollection leverages path-based ownership, eliminating the need to fetch parent document data for authorization.
*   **Clarity of Intent:** The structure makes authorization intent explicit by using path-based ownership for user-specific data.
*   **DBAC:** Roles are managed implicitly by the Firestore structure, using `request.auth.uid` for authentication and path ownership for authorization.
*   **QAPs:** The structure allows for secure listing operations by segregating user-specific data into subcollections with path-based ownership.
*   **Invariants:** The structure supports data integrity by enforcing ownership and providing a clear structure for timestamps and denormalized data.
